title: Commercial Transactions Notice
description: This page is required under Japan's Act on Specified Commercial Transactions.
intro:
This disclosure is made in accordance with Japan's Act on Specified Commercial Transactions (Article 11, Mail-Order Sales).

Wellsy offers a Premium subscription (monthly and annual plans) via the App Store (Apple Inc.) and Google Play (Google LLC). Subscription status is managed through RevenueCat, Inc.

rows: Available upon request (as permitted by law)
Available upon request. Please contact us by email.

Base plan: Free (current)
Premium plan (planned): Price displayed in App Store / Google Play at time of purchase (tax included)
Internet access and data transfer fees (borne by the user)

App Store (iPhone/iPad): payment via Apple ID
Google Play (Android): payment via Google account
Charged immediately upon purchase; subsequently charged automatically at each renewal date
Premium features available immediately after payment (once billing is introduced)
Due to the digital nature of the content, refunds are generally not available after purchase. Please contact Apple (reportaproblem.apple.com) or Google Play for store-level refund requests.
iOS 16.0 or later / Android 9.0 or later
A free trial may be offered at launch. If not cancelled before the end of the trial, the subscription converts automatically to paid.

sections.heading: How to Cancel

subsections.heading: iPhone / iPad
subsections.body: Settings → your name → Subscriptions → Wellsy → Cancel Subscription

subsections.heading: Android
subsections.body: Google Play → Menu (☰) → Subscriptions → Wellsy → Cancel

sections.note: Cancel before the next renewal date. Access continues until the end of the billing period. You must cancel through your device store; emailing the Operator does not cancel the subscription.
